title: The AI writing tool built specifically for book creation is on sale for just $33
excerpt: Keep your voice. Save your time.
content_html:
TL;DR: Get lifetime Youbooks AI access for just $32.97 (reg. $540) through July 26 and create publish-ready non-fiction books using multiple AI models, built-in research, and commercial publishing rights.

Credit: Youbooks

$32.97
$540 Save $507.03

Writing a non-fiction book usually takes months of research, outlining, drafting, and editing. For entrepreneurs, creators, consultants, and educators, finding that kind of time isn’t always realistic — even when they have plenty to say.

Youbooks AI was made to help significantly speed up that process. Through July 26, you can get a lifetime subscription for $32.97, giving you an AI-powered platform designed specifically for creating long-form, non-fiction books.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Unlike AI tools that focus on short-form content, Youbooks is built around the entire publishing process. It combines the strengths of multiple AI models—including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Llama—to help generate cohesive manuscripts of up to 300,000 words. It also performs real-time web research as you write, allowing your content to incorporate current facts and supporting information as it’s generated.

The platform is highly customizable, too. You can upload your own documents, transcripts, research, or notes to ground the book in your expertise, while storing writing samples that help the AI match your preferred tone and style throughout the manuscript.

Each subscription includes 250,000 monthly credits, support for up to 100 style samples and 100 source documents, plus the ability to export completed books in DOCX, EPUB, and Markdown formats. Better yet, you retain full commercial rights, so you’re free to publish or sell what you create.

Whether you’re writing a business guide, an educational resource, a niche publication, or a thought leadership book, Youbooks is designed to shorten the journey from idea to finished manuscript.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Youbooks AI Lifetime is available for $32.97 (reg. $540), only through July 26, offering a practical way to turn your expertise into a publish-ready book.

StackSocial prices subject to change.

content_html_zh:
长话短说：截至 7 月 26 日，只需 32.97 美元（原价 540 美元）即可获得终身 Youbooks AI 访问权限，并使用多种 AI 模型、内置研究和商业出版权创建可出版的非小说类书籍。

信用：Youbooks

$32.97
$540 Save $507.03

写一本非小说类书籍通常需要数月的研究、提纲、起草和编辑。 对于企业家、创造者、顾问和教育工作者来说，找到这样的时间并不总是现实的——即使他们有很多话要说。

Youbooks AI 的诞生是为了帮助显着加快这一过程。 截至 7 月 26 日，您可以以 32.97 美元的价格获得终身订阅，为您提供一个专门为创作长篇非小说类书籍而设计的人工智能平台。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

与专注于简短内容的人工智能工具不同，Youbooks 是围绕整个发布流程构建的。 它结合了多种 AI 模型（包括 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini 和 Llama）的优势，帮助生成最多 300,000 字的连贯手稿。 它还会在您撰写时执行实时网络研究，使您的内容能够纳入当前事实并在生成时支持信息。

该平台也具有高度可定制性。 您可以上传自己的文档、成绩单、研究或笔记，以您的专业知识为本书奠定基础，同时存储写作样本，帮助人工智能在整个手稿中匹配您喜欢的语气和风格。

每个订阅包括 250,000 个每月积分，支持多达 100 个样式样本和 100 个源文档，并且能够以 DOCX、EPUB 和 Markdown 格式导出已完成的书籍。 更好的是，您保留完整的商业权利，因此您可以自由发布或出售您创建的内容。

无论您是在撰写商业指南、教育资源、利基出版物还是思想领导力书籍，Youbooks 都旨在缩短从想法到完成手稿的旅程。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

Youbooks AI Lifetime 售价 32.97 美元（原价 540 美元），截止日期为 7 月 26 日，提供了一种实用的方法，可以将您的专业知识转化为可出版的书籍。

StackSocial 价格可能会发生变化。
